info.title: solution-setup
info.description: Scaffold .NET solutions with strong foundations and optional Clean Architecture layout.

options.name: --solutionName
options.description: Name of the solution (also used as project prefix)

options.name: --path
options.description: Target directory where the solution folder will be created. Defaults to the current directory.

options.name: --framework
options.description: Target framework for generated projects (net9.0 or net10.0). [default: net9.0]

options.name: --layout
options.description: Layout to scaffold (foundation or clean). [default: foundation]

options.name: --testFramework
options.description: Test framework to use for test projects. [default: xunit]

options.name: --skipGlobalJson
options.description: If set, global.json will not be created. [default: False]

options.name: --presentation
options.description: Presentation style for clean layout (api or mvc). [default: api]

options.name: --solutionFormat
options.description: Solution format to emit (sln or slnx). Defaults to sln. [default: sln]

options.name: --dryRun
options.description: Show what would be generated without writing files or running dotnet commands. [default: False]
